birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-capped monarch is found in the Western Province of the Solomon Islands on the islands of New Georgia, Rendova, Kolombangara, Vella Lavella, Ranongga, Tetepare, Gizo, Vangunu, and Arundel Island as well as some of the smaller islands
